name: Composite Joint Rule
description: Combines multiple joint rules to handle clusters of 3 or more elements. All pairwise candidates in the cluster must be matched by a sub-rule for the composite to succeed. Overrides pairwise rules at shared nodes.

inputParameters.name: rules
inputParameters.description: Joint rules to apply to pairwise candidates within the cluster.

inputParameters.name: min_count
inputParameters.description: Minimum number of beams in the cluster. Defaults to 3.

inputParameters.name: max_count
inputParameters.description: Maximum number of beams in the cluster. Leave unconnected for no upper limit.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: name of the resulting joint, optional
